title: Flowerier Iron Golems
description: Adds more flora to iron golems from Programmer Art
body:
[![Dinar's Programmer Art Tweaks Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10b5046ec172256e2052997ecdf8d8e7eaa35fed.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rCpnq8Tm)

Want to see more flowers and plants on your iron golems? Install the Flowerier Iron Golems resource pack!

![Iron Golem in a village](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Din37r/Dinar-s_Resource_Packs_Images/refs/heads/main/2025-11-22_13.48.40.png)
![Iron Golem protecting a village from zombies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Din37r/Dinar-s_Resource_Packs_Images/refs/heads/main/2025-11-22_13.52.50.png)
